items.name: Beast Scroll
items.use: Increases attack damage of allied units within range 500 by 10% for 10 seconds.

items.name: Potion of Recovery
items.use: Replenishes 1000 hit points and 750 mana over 7.5 seconds. Only works out of combat.

items.name: Wand of the Wind
items.use: Cyclone a non-allied unit within range 500 for 5 seconds. For the duration, unit cannot be interacted with.

items.name: Watcher Eye
items.use: Mark a non-allied target within range 800. You have vision of the marked target. Can be dispelled.

items.name: Floating Eye
items.use: Spawn a fragile invisible flying entity that provides vision for 240 seconds. The entity can move, but is very slow.

items.name: Healing Ward
items.use: Drop a healing ward up to range 500, healing all allied units within same range for next 30 seconds.

items.name: Wand of Neutralization
items.use: Sends out a chain of dispelling magic that neutralizes the target unit and up to 5 additional nearby targets, killing summoned units. Bounces focus on units on the same side as the primary target.

items.name: Staff of Teleportation
items.use: Teleports you to the allied target structure after 3 seconds of channeling.

items.name: Manual of Retraining
items.use: Unlearns all hero abilities and returns the skill points.

items.name: Pearl of Vision

active.name: Reveal
active.description: Reveal a circular area on the map with radius 2250, granting true sight for 8 seconds.

items.comment: Added true sight but reduced duration

items.name: Chimera Pendant

active.name: Summon Chimera Scout
active.description: Summon a chimera scout. Lasts 40 seconds.

items.comment: Item without an identity and breaks the "rules" of items. Only use case is grabbing "stolen items" in seeds and should be kept simply for that.

active.name: Invisibility
active.description: Invisibility for 3 seconds. For the duration, move through units and damage is reduced by 50% for slightly longer.

items.name: Magic Coral
items.comment: Removing mana regen to make tier 2 feel more unique (and easier to follow item rules). Buffing mana to make up for it.

passives.name: Runic Mark
passives.description: Basic attacks apply a runic mark on the target for 2.5 seconds, causing them to deal 10 bonus magic damage on-hit consuming the mark.

passives.name: Tidal Fortitude
passives.description: Reduce incoming damage by 1%.

passives.name: Crisis Regen
passives.description: When below 50% health, regeneration granted by this item is doubled.

passives.name: Tidal Aura
passives.description: Allied units within range 800 regenerate 5 mana and 5 hit points per second.

items.name: Stormrider Cloak

active.name: Shadow Walk
active.description: Turn the holder invisible and grant 20% movement speed for (15 + hero level) seconds over 0.5 seconds. For the duration the holder can move through units.

passives.name: Nightsight
passives.description: The holder's vision is not reduced during night time.

items.comment: Removed other stats. Adding wand to the build up because we can associate wand = ms as for the builder and the boots

active.name: Bond
active.description: Select an allied unit. For the next 7.5 seconds, 15% of the damage both units take is shared as pure damage, and both gain 2 bonus armor.

items.name: Caster Scroll

passives.name: Swift Casting
passives.description: Decrease the cooldown of the owner abilities by 10%.

items.comment: Removing Chimaera Pendant for build path and replacing it with another HP component.

active.name: Abysmal Drink
active.description: Replenishes 600 hit points over 2.5 seconds.

items.name: Ethereal Mirror

active.name: Ethernity
active.description: Turns units and structures within the target area ethereal for 5 seconds. Structures briefly lose collision after cast, but this ends if attacked. Nearby towers increase the delay. While ethereal, units take 15% increased magic damage.

passives.name: Nightsight
passives.description: The holder's vision is not reduced during night time.

items.comment: Removed from build paths: considered like Tidal Guardian's Grace

active.name: Energy Blast
active.description: Sends lightning to a non-allied unit within range 650, dealing 195 magic damage to the target and nearby units within range 250. Titan hunters take additional damage equal to 15% of their max health. Builder units take 50% reduced damage. Killing a target refunds 40% of the cooldown.

passives.name: Healing Amplification
passives.description: Upon casting a healing spell, you get healed for an additional 15%.

active.name: Grand Reveal
active.description: Reveal a circular area on the map with radius 3000, granting true sight for 12.5 seconds.

items.name: Tidal Guardian's Grace

passives.name: Shallow Spawns
passives.description: Killing critters spawns shallow spawns for 45 seconds. These fragile mobile units can be used for scouting and killing buildings. You may control up to 1 at a time.

items.comment:
Should be considered a pure utility item pre first mini kill and therefore should be easier to invest into and sell later. Also removing Chimaera Pendant from build path. 

yokola95: cheaper. You still need to get 90 gold from it to go even

active.name: Voodoo Ward
active.description: Create a fragile voodoo ward at the target point within range 1000, lasting 150 seconds.

passives.name: Voodoo Power
passives.description: Voodoo ward reduces enemy armor by 3 within 300 range.

items.name: Gauntlets of Embers

passives.name: Structure Burn
passives.description: Attacks burn enemy structures for 10 seconds, dealing 5% maximum hit point of the structure per second.

items.comment: Should have a simple identity as the wall farmer. Reducing gold costs makes the item easier to access and replace later if the Titan wishes.

passives.name: Runic Mark
passives.description: Basic attacks apply a runic mark for 2.5 seconds. Attacking a marked target consumes the mark and deals 25 magic damage (200 magic damage to hunters).

passives.name: Structure Crusher
passives.description: Basic attacks on structures deal 10 + 2×Level bonus pure damage on hit, up to a maximum of 30 bonus damage.

active.name: War Shout
active.description: Gain 25% bonus attack damage for 8 seconds

active.name: Eternal Wards
active.description: Spawn a healing ward at the target location for 30 seconds. The ward recovers lost hit points to all friendly units within range 600.

active.name: Farsight
active.description: Reveals a circular area on the map within radius (3000 + 30% windsom), granting true sight for 12.5 seconds.

passives.name: True Sight
passives.description: While Farsight is ready, the holder has true sight, seeing invisible units within range 1100.

active.name: Energy Blast
active.description:
Sends lightning to a non-allied unit within range 750, dealing 200 magic damage to the target and nearby enemies within range 250. Titan hunters take 15% max health bonus damage. 
Builder units take 50% reduced damage.

passives.name: Nukemaster
passives.description: Titan's nuke deals 20% bonus damage.

passives.name: Master Casting
passives.description: Decrease the cooldown of the owner abilities by 20%.

items.name: Mace of Mortality

active.name: War Cry
active.description:
For 10 seconds, temporarily increase your hit points by 1500.  Allies within range 1000 gain 15% bonus damage. 
Colossus damage is doubled during War Cry.

passives.name: Colossus
passives.description: Basic attacks deal bonus physical damage equal to 2% of your current Hit Points.

passives.name: Immovable
passives.description: Each attack applies a non-stackable buff that restores 2% maximum hit points over 1 second

items.comment:
Not sure if the buff should refresh on AA (maybe the tick is gonna work instantly and it just ends up being on hit or it should not be refreshable)

yokola95: I think maximum hp -> current hp is more fitting but that's me maybe. I am still on the fence on whether this should have the vampirism effect attached to it.
yokola95: I think we need to keep vampirism as an aura so that you cannot stack vampirism effect from too many different t3 items.

I think building from enchantress fluid makes more sense and add vampirism somewhere else

active.name: Mana Surge
active.description: Regenerate (1500 + 500% windsom) mana and health over 2.5 seconds. For the duration, the user is invulnerable.

passives.name: Unstable Magic
passives.description: Allied units within range 1000 regenerate 8 bonus mana and hit points per second.

passives.name: Tidal Fortitude
passives.description: Damage taken is reduced by 2%.

passives.name: Crisis Regen
passives.description: When below 50% health, regeneration granted by this item is doubled.

active.name: Realmshift
active.description: Turn ethereal for up to 10 seconds, broken once you cast a spell. While ethereal, incoming healing is increased by 10% + 25% windsom.

passives.name: Spell Armor
passives.description: Spellcasts heal you for 10% max mana and increase your armor by 2 for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times, renewing on each spell cast.

passives.name: Master Casting
passives.description: Decrease the cooldown of the owner abilities by 20%

active.name: Call of Valor
active.description:
Select a target allied unit within range 1000. For the next 10 seconds the two units share 25% of the damage they take as pure damage, and both gain 5 bonus armor.
While bonded, both units regenerate 50 hit points per second.

active.name: Enchanted Wards
active.description: Place a healing ward without consuming this item. The ward lasts 30 seconds, healing all friendly units within range 600.

passives.name: Healing Amplification
passives.description: Upon casting a healing spell, you get healed for an additional 30%.

passives.name: Crisis Regen
passives.description: When below 50% health, regeneration granted by this item is doubled.

items.name: Foreteller's Sickle

active.name: Runic Wrath
active.description: Each attack consumes 15% of your current mana, and 25% of the mana consumed this way is added as additional magic damage. The effect is halved against units.

passives.name: Magic Restoration
passives.description: Each spell cast replenishes 25% of your max mana. //// alternative: each attack restores 150 mana (which I think it is more fun) // Each attack gives you a buff that restores 5% of your maximum mana over 1 second (to be a counterpart of mace but for mana matters build).

items.comment: Mana matter build for windsom titan.

active.name: Voodoo Wards
active.description: Create a fragile voodoo ward at the target point within range 1000, lasting 200 seconds.

passives.name: Voodoo
passives.description: Voodoo ward reduces enemy armor by 5 within 500 range.

passives.name: Vampirism
passives.description: Basic attacks heal you for 25% of the damage dealt

items.name: Mistlord's Cape

active.name: Shadow Walk
active.description: Turns the holder invisible and grants 20% bonus movement speed for (15+ hero level) seconds over 0.5 seconds. For the duration the holder can move through units. The first attack breaking the invisibility will apply a dispel to the target and nearby units.

passives.name: Nightsight
passives.description: The holder's vision is not reduced during night time.

items.comment: I think mistlord could be removed. Another option is to make it an expensive situational item that is strong against summons, merch, mag and Tauren. I do not think it actually would be useful in any real game (maybe strong against merch rush? but spending 400 gold on this item while getting merch rushed does not look ideal), but I cannot come up with any better idea.

items.name: Molten Blade

passives.name: Emberhearth
passives.description: Attacks on structures reveal the immediate surroundings for 15 seconds.

passives.name: Fiery Touch
passives.description: Attacks burn enemy structures for 5 seconds, dealing 10% of the maximum hit point of the structure + 25 damage per second.

passives.name: Spectral Fire
passives.description: Killing an enemy causes a fiery explosion dealing 49 damage to nearby enemies and structures. Harvesters yield 2 gold upon dying.

items.comment:
Removed attack speed and followed yokola95 ideas of %dmg. Way worse for sieging, way better for farming walls, way cheaper.

Another idea:  keep the mark from runic axe and consuming a mark causes a fiery explosion dealing 50 damage to nearby enemies and structure (if you start attacking a wall you can clear the worker block). Keep harvester yield 2 gold upon dying.

items.name: Poseidon's Trident

active.name: Unleashed Rage
active.description: Gain 35% bonus attack damage for 10 seconds

passives.name: Titan
passives.description: Basic attacks on structures deal 10 + (5 × hero level) bonus pure damage on hit.

items.comment: Move speed should not be on this item, weird build path + regaining its identity as a high burst option.

passives.name: Fervor
passives.description: Basic attacks grant bonus attack speed for 2.5 seconds, stacking up to 6 times for up to 20% bonus attack speed.

active.name: Consume Ankh
active.description: Consume the ankh, gaining the bonuses granted by this item.

passives.name: Reincarnation
passives.description: Upon death, respawn with 2500 hit points, activating Superiority.

items.name: Berserker's Gem
items.comment: Classic attack speed stat stick Tier 2 item that is usable for several builds.

items.name: Vampiric Mask

passives.name: Vampirism
passives.description: Basic attacks heal you for 25% of damage dealt.

items.comment: We are lacking a pure "Lifesteal" TIER-2 item.

items.name: Cyclone Staff

active.name: Cyclone
active.description: Cyclone a non-allied unit within range 500 for 5 seconds. For the duration, unit cannot be interacted with.

items.comment: Like eternal ward, the possibility to have a cyclone effect without losing a consumable. It also allows to do double wand by using this item and a wand of the wind after. The item needs to be relatively cheap because it has no stats.

items.name: Boots of the Wind

active.name: Gust of Wind
active.description: Increase movement speed by 25% for 3 seconds.

items.comment: Build up to give speed boost. Useful to catch builders

items.name: Ancient Staff of the Wind

active.name: Wind
active.description: It can select either a friendly unit or a enemy unit. If it selects an enemy unit, it casts cyclone, disabling the enemy unit for 5 seconds. If it selects a friendly unit, it provides 25% movement speed for 3 seconds, and also removes collision to enemy units for the duration (you still collide with enemy buildings).

items.comment: This item is an alternative to stormrider cloak as an upgrade to webbed feet. The active component is strong against worker-block if cast on self, and the active component can be used to setup a nuke on enemy rewaller (which is still countered by detoing one of your workers from worker block :) ). While the active part is strong, the item is balanced on the fact that it provides no stats as a tier 3 item.

items.name: Bloodfang

active.name: Bloodbath
active.description: For 8 seconds, increase lifesteal from all sources by 400%.

passives.name: Master Vampirism
passives.description: Basic attacks heal you for 50% of damage dealt.

items.comment: Pure lifesteal item. Master Vampirism passive overwrite Vampirism passive from other items.
